return(function(Z,R,r,S,o,U,X,F,z,J,D,E,q,f,t,K,Y,i,e,I,Q,W,A,C)Y,J,f,t,z,W,F,Q,E,e,K,D,A,i,I,C,q=function(Z,H)local R=A(H)local r=function(r,S,o,U)return J(Z,{r;S;o;U},H,R)end return r
